title: Default export names and file names should match
description: Default export names and file names should matchAnalyze your codeconsistency-identifiablemaintainabilityCode Smellconventiones2015confusingWhy is this an issue?By convention, a file that exports only one class, function, or constant should be named for that class, function or constant. Anything else may confuse maintainers.Noncompliant code example// file path: myclass.js -- Noncompliant class MyClass { // ... } export default MyClass;Compliant solution// file path: MyClass.js class MyClass { // ..
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Default export name should match the filename (case-sensitive)
